title: Will doubters believe in Hearts' title chances now?
description: Some have waited all season for Hearts to falter. Plenty thought it might be at Easter Road. But Derek McInnes' side are still going, writes Tom English.
content:
One by one, the maroon waves started washing towards the away end at Easter Road.
In victory - late and glorious and possibly historic - Lawrence Shankland ran towards the Hearts fans and punched the air, an afternoon of frustration and relief pourin... [4807 chars]

title: Assault in lane close to M1 prompts police appeal
description: A description of the attacker, a man in his 50s, with grey hair and beard, has been issued.
content:
The sexual assault of a woman in a lane close to the M1 in Leicestershire has prompted an appeal from police.
Officers said the victim, who is in her 20s, was in Baines Lane - an access road off the A47 Hinckley Road, near the southbound M1 Leicester... [604 chars]

title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
description: The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.
content:
US President Donald Trump and his officials were the "likely" targets of a suspected gunman who attempted to storm the White House Correspondents' Dinner, acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche has said.

title: Hearts leave it late to sink nine-man Hibernian and capitalise on Rangers loss
description: Blair Spittal’s 86th-minute winner boosted Hearts’ title hopes as they won 2-1 at Easter Road, while Rangers slipped up at home to Motherwell
content:
Hearts boosted their Scottish Premiership title hopes after Blair Spittal’s 86th-minute winner earned a dramatic derby victory over nine-man Hibernian, putting Derek McInnes’ side three points clear after Rangers lost at home to Motherwell.

title: Team News: Man United vs. Brentford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
description: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of the Premier League clash between Manchester United and Brentford.
content:
